movie.title: Waxwork
movie.description: Wealthy slacker college student Mark, his new girlfriend Sarah, and their friends are invited to a special showing at a mysterious wax museum which displays 18 of the most evil men of all time. After his ex-girlfriend and another friend disappear, Mark becomes suspicious.

movie.title: Out Of The Cell, Into The Fire
movie.description: A trio of stalkers infiltrate a quiet suburb and force a new family into the astral plane, where they uncover a terrifying truth: the Further is bleeding into the real world.

movie.title: Stab
movie.description: A group of college friends get together for a murder mystery weekend, but what starts as a little friendly game gets dark and bloody when they start actually being murdered.

movie.title: Haute Tension
movie.description: Best friends Marie and Alexia decide to spend a quiet weekend at Alexia's parents' secluded farmhouse. But on the night of their arrival, the girls' idyllic getaway turns into an endless night of horror.

movie.title: The Night Of The Scorpion
movie.description: This Spanish-Italian co-production tells the story of a man who feels deep guilt for the death of his wife: he, an alcoholic, is convinced that he accidentally caused her fatal fall in their house while he was drunk. He finds a new wife, but he is unable to cope with his first wife's death. Furthermore, the maid and his sister do not accept the new woman in the household. After a while, bodies begin turn up ... and the grave of the man's first wife is empty!

movie.title: Sci-Fi : Alien Titans Invade Earth, Humanity Launches The Ultimate Counterattack!
movie.description: Calling all Aliens from Angel City to the desert, razor sharp claws, killer parasites, deadly websites, and world destruction prevail. But have no fear. Bradbury, Jack Deth, Zack Stone and Paul Dean, will save the day. They are out of this world!

movie.title: Haunting At The Beacon
movie.description: While trying to get their lives back on track after the loss of their four year old son, Bryn and Paul Shaw move to the charming old Beacon Apartments. Bryn begins seeing a ghostly little boy skulking around the building. With the help of an eccentric young professor and a tough old beat cop, Bryn tries to uncover the details of the boy's death.

movie.title: Inhabited By Madness
movie.description: This horror film exposes the terrifying psychic phenomena that lurk in everyday life. The film consists of a documentary in which a psychic navigates through haunted places and a horror drama in which Mai Wakana appears. You can experience spine-chilling terror.

movie.title: Shadowbuilder
movie.description: A demon is summoned to take the soul of a young boy who has the potential to become a saint. By doing this he will open a doorway to hell and destroy the world.

movie.title: Night Of The Living Dead
movie.description: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

movie.title: The Little Patient
movie.description: Some secrets are better left at the bottom of the ocean. Once she's in your house, there is no escape. When a struggling artist pulls a beautiful, unconscious woman from the freezing coastal waters, he thinks he’s performed a miracle. But as she recovers within the walls of his secluded home, a series of unsettling events leads him to a terrifying realization: her presence is no coincidence. She is inextricably linked to the same watery grave that claimed his family years ago.

movie.title: 20 Days Later
movie.description: Twenty-eight days after a killer virus was accidentally unleashed from a British research facility, a small group of London survivors are caught in a desperate struggle to protect themselves from the infected. Carried by animals and humans, the virus turns those it infects into homicidal maniacs -- and it's absolutely impossible to contain.

movie.title: Skin Walker
movie.description: When her grandmother is brutally murdered, Regine, a fragile young woman must return to the countryside she has struggled to escape in order to engage with the family guilt she’s tried to shut out of her life - and to connect with the brother she has never known.

movie.title: The Blood Beast Terror
movie.description: A scientist working with genetics creates a horrifying flying creature that feeds on human blood. Following a gruesome trail of dead bodies, Scotland Yard investigators must scramble to halt its ravenous rampage.

movie.title: House Of The Damned
movie.description: An architect and his wife are staying in an empty castle in California. They are joined by an unhappily married lawyer and his wife. Things start getting strange when they spot a half man/half beast prowling around the house and keep seeing a headless woman wandering the grounds.

movie.title: She Rises
movie.description: A director and her lead actor get a vacation rental while filming a movie. Their host, who initially comes across as extremely sweet and caring, becomes their worst nightmare.

movie.title: The Mad Monster
movie.description: A mad scientist changes his simple-minded handyman into a werewolf in order to prove his supposedly crazy scientific theories - and exact revenge.

movie.title: Boris Karloff
movie.description: Boris Karloff: The Rest of the Story takes a deeper look at the life and career of Boris Karloff, from 1931 to 1969, exploring films such as The Ghoul, The Walking Dead (1936), Charlie Chan at the Opera (1936), the Mr Wong series, The Climax (1944), Lured (1947), The Strange Door (1951), Grip of the Strangler and Corridors of Blood(1958), The Comedy of Terrors (1963), The Curse of the Crimson Altar (1968), the Mexican quartet, some of his major TV appearances (The Girl From U.N.C.L.E., Wild Wild West, I-Spy) as well as taking a deep look at his often ignored Broadway career in the 1940s and 50's. There is also much time devoted to Karloff's more personal side and his relationship with his daughter, Sara.

movie.title: The Seventh Grave
movie.description: Ghosts and dead bodies infest a small nineteenth-century village.

movie.title: Settima Tomba
movie.description: Ghosts and dead bodies infest a small nineteenth-century village.

movie.title: Scarred
movie.description: Twenty years ago, after his wife gave birth to another man's baby, an alcoholic husband sought revenge by slicing off the child's face and throwing her tiny body in the swamp. Today, the locals say that the little girl never really died -- and that she aimlessly roams the forest looking for a pretty face to take for her own. Now, a family of campers who've come to the woods for the weekend are in for a gruesome surprise.

movie.title: A Fire Friendship
movie.description: A man is tormented by a mysterious dark figure in the woods.

movie.title: Horrors Of Spider Island
movie.description: A bite from a giant spider turns a man into a creature that terrorizes a group of women who survived a plane crash.

movie.title: A Violent House
movie.description: Hong Kong horror.

movie.title: Servants Of Twilight
movie.description: Based on the novel by Dean R. Koontz, this action packed thriller features Bruce Greenwood as a private detective hired to protect a little boy from a fanatical religious cult that believe he is the antichrist fortold in the book of Revelations.

movie.title: The Haunting Girl
movie.description: Taiwanese horror movie from 1975.

movie.title: Hp Lovecraft'S : The Deep Ones
movie.description: A married couple rents a beachside Airbnb, only to be surrounded by peculiar neighbors and occurrences. They soon discover they are in the grip of a mysterious cult and their ancient sea god.

movie.title: Unseen Presence
movie.description: Omagatoki means a time when you are about to encounter something mysterious. Is it a person or is it something other than a person? Or are they something other than a person? Includes "Kutsukiru mono", "Wandering mono", and six other stories.

movie.title: Grave Secrets : The Legacy Of Hill Top Drive
movie.description: A woman tormented by ghostly apparitions and a professor of psychic phenomena investigate other-worldly disturbances and unlock the secret of a malevolent force reaching out for vengeance from beyond the grave.

movie.title: Grave Intentions
movie.description: In this anthology of chills, thrills, and kills, a practitioner of the magical arts teaches the basics of her craft. The most important lesson? You must be mindful of your intention. Five of her customers are about to learn this the hard way: A woman looking to change her luck gets ensnared in a dangerous game; In the quest for justice, a man is transformed into a monster; In an attempt to right a wrong, a woman rescues a stray cat; A father and son are torn apart when a joke goes too far; A young girl needs protection from the demons in her life.

movie.title: A Psychopath'S Intentions
movie.description: No description.

movie.title: Don'T Turn Around
movie.description: A woman is awakened by a sinister force in the dark.

movie.title: Penny Dreadful
movie.description: Young Penny goes on a retreat with her psychologist; the intention is to help her overcome her phobia, an intense fear of cars. Unexpected events find her in a nightmarish situation where her worst fears come true.

movie.title: The Last Curtain Call
movie.description: Three years after completing a deadly game, high schoolers trapped in a looping nightmare must survive brutal encounters and unravel a terrifying curse.

movie.title: Crocodile Swarm
movie.description: A group who break into and old mining cave system soon realise a nest of Crocodiles inhabit the caves.

movie.title: Jaws Of Death
movie.description: A man accidentally learns that he has a mystical connection with sharks, and is given a strange medallion by a shaman. Becoming more and more alienated from normal society, he develops an ability to communicate with sharks telepathically, setting out to destroy anybody who harms sharks. People enter into his strange world to exploit his weird passion, and he uses the animals to gain revenge on anybody who double crosses him.

movie.title: Parents
movie.description: Michael is a young boy living in a typical 1950s suburbanite home... except for his bizarre and horrific nightmares, and continued unease around his parents. Young Michael begins to suspect his parents are cooking more than just hamburgers on the grill outside, but has trouble explaining his fears to his new-found friend Sheila, or the school's social worker.

movie.title: Popeye'S Revenge
movie.description: The legend of Popeye haunts a group of counsellors as they intend to open a summer camp.

movie.title: The Traveler
movie.description: On a dark Christmas Eve in a small town, the lone Sheriffs on the night shift encounter a mysterious man who goes by the name of Mr. Nobody. As the night progresses, the Sheriffs discover that this isn't just a nobody, but a vengeful killer whose past threatens to haunt them all.

movie.title: Blood Relic
movie.description: A group of college kids hired to help open an aviation museum on a closed U.S. military airbase accidentally unearth an ancient artifact which unleashes an evil spirit whom possesses them one by one making the host kill off the rest.

movie.title: Area 51 Was Just The Beginning
movie.description: Three young conspiracy theorists attempt to uncover the mysteries of Area 51, the government's secret location rumored to have hosted encounters with alien beings. What they find at this hidden facility exposes unimaginable secrets.

movie.title: Beneath Us
movie.description: The American Dream becomes a nightmare for a group of undocumented day laborers hired by a wealthy couple. What they expect to be their biggest payday turns into a terrifying fight for survival.

movie.title: Hide And Seek
movie.description: David Callaway tries to piece together his life in the wake of his wife's suicide and has been left to raise his nine-year-old daughter, Emily on his own. David is at first amused to discover that Emily has created an imaginary friend named 'Charlie', but it isn't long before 'Charlie' develops a sinister and violent side, and as David struggles with his daughter's growing emotional problems, he comes to the frightening realisation that 'Charlie' isn't just a figment of Emily's imagination.

movie.title: Killing Spree At Sea
movie.description: Newly wed Tom Russo suspects his wife is having sexual encounters with their suburban neighbors, and launches a methodical campaign to murder the lovers.

movie.title: Creatures From Green Hell
movie.description: An attorney arrives at a castle to settle the estate of its recently deceased owner. The owner's wife and daughter reveal that he was someone who was able to summon the souls of ancient plague victims and, in fact, his spirit was roaming the castle at that very moment. Soon occupants of the castle begin to die off in gruesome, violent ways.

movie.title: Dragon Fury
movie.description: A group of soldiers are taken to the mountains of Wales to investigate a strange looking monster.

movie.title: The Tunnel
movie.description: In 2007, in the midst of the drought and water shortages, the NSW State government has unveiled plans to tap into and recycle millions of litres of water trapped in a network of abandoned train tunnels just beneath the heart of Sydney. However the government suddenly goes cold on the plan and it is not made public why. There is talk of homeless people who use the tunnel as shelter going missing, even though the government states that there are no homeless people in there. This, and the silence from the officials and ministers, leads a journalist, Natasha to begin an investigation into a government cover-up. She and her crew Pete (Producer), Steve (Cameraman) and Tangles (Sound Technichian) decide to investigate the story in the tunnel.

movie.title: Blood Bound
movie.description: Bound to an ancient pact, a family of unlimited power descend upon a small rural town to sacrifice 4 human lives.

movie.title: The Possessed One
movie.description: A former priest, now an exorcist, battles the satanic forces that are threatening the students at a girls school.

movie.title: The Brain From Planet Arous
movie.description: An evil alien brain, bent on world domination, takes over the body of an atomic scientist, while a "good" alien brain inhabits the body of the scientist's dog and waits for an opportunity to defeat the evil brain.

movie.title: Unspeakable
movie.description: Despite vocal objections from Warden Blakely, prison psychologist Diana Purlow journeys deep inside the mind of serial killer Jesse Mowat in a desperate attempt to reveal the source of his psychotic tendencies.

movie.title: Eternal : Kiss Of The Mummy
movie.description: An alcoholic American couple travel to Ireland with their son so he can meet his grandmother but they walk in on their crazed uncle who is in the midst of reviving a centuries-old Druid witch.

movie.title: Trucks
movie.description: A group of seemingly humanistic trucks takeover a truck stop and starts killing everything in sight. The remaining townsfolk must band together and come up with a way to murder the inanimate objects, a seemingly difficult task considering the abnormal circumstances.

movie.title: Voice Of Shadows
movie.description: A young working class woman stands to inherit an estate if she and her boyfriend abide by a set of bizarre stipulations.

movie.title: The Mistress And The Wife
movie.description: Newlyweds Parker and Madeline move into their dream home. As they settle in, they discover a box of old love letters written to the original owner. And as the couple digs into the increasingly obsessive correspondence, a mysterious woman arrives with a horrifying secret that threatens their lives.

movie.title: Ash And Bone
movie.description: The film follows a rebellious teen named Cassie Vanderbilt, whose wild streak escalates as her caring father Lucas decides to take her and his new wife Sarah out of the city for some bonding and quality time together. But after Cassie crosses the infamous McKinley family, it becomes clear that sometimes danger lies hidden in the weeds, ready to strike at any moment.

movie.title: Eegah, The Giant
movie.description: Teenagers stumble across a prehistoric caveman, who goes on a rampage.

movie.title: The Last Sect
movie.description: A seductively lethal vampire sect leader has been battling famed vampire hunter Van Helsing's descendent for decades. But now she and her bloodthirsty followers face extinction unless they can find a willing victim who will ensure their future survival. It's up to Van Helsing to stop the blood from flowing in this thrilling, action-packed duel to the death!

movie.title: Into The Woods
movie.description: A woman is drugged, abducted and pursued in the woods by a mysterious assailant.

movie.title: Leprechaun : Back 2 Tha Hood
movie.description: When Emily Woodrow and her friends happen on a treasure chest full of gold coins, they fail to to heed the warnings of a wise old psychic who had foretold that they would encounter trouble with a very nasty and protective Leprechaun.

movie.title: Eye Of The Demon
movie.description: A young newlywed couple move to a remote island only to find a secret coven of witches who want them to join all the fun...or face the consequences.

movie.title: Sky Monster
movie.description: Cindy gets a dream gift for her 21st birthday. She and her friends hop aboard a private jet, heading to a party island. Enroute they find themselves drawn into a storm formation and trapped inside. There is more in this storm than thunder and lightning though, a giant sky Kraken!

movie.title: Soul Survivors
movie.description: A college freshman involved in a fatal car crash discovers she may not have survived after all when she becomes caught between the worlds of the living and the dead.

movie.title: Detention
movie.description: A group of high school students are sent to Detention. Abandoned and locked in, images of Ghosts appear as they attempt to escape, only to find themselves connected to a past horrific death and made responsible for it with their lives.

movie.title: The Call Of The Dead
movie.description: When Alya loses her daughter in a tragic accident, she buries her in the backyard of her mother’s village home. But the land is cursed—now her daughter has risen and she’s no longer the same.

movie.title: Carnival Of Souls
movie.description: Mary Henry ends up the sole survivor of a fatal car accident through mysterious circumstances. Trying to put the incident behind her, she moves to Utah and takes a job as a church organist. But her fresh start is interrupted by visions of a fiendish man. As the visions begin to occur more frequently, Mary finds herself drawn to the deserted carnival on the outskirts of town. The strangely alluring carnival may hold the secret to her tragic past.

movie.title: Nightscare
movie.description: An experiment gone awry places a neurologist and a homicide detective in a psychopath's nightmarish world.

movie.title: The Haunting Of Lisa
movie.description: A precocious youngster's visions of a mysterious woman and a series of child murders leads her mom to seek help from the authorities.

movie.title: The Cool Kids
movie.description: A group of kids who go up to the mountains to party find themselves snowed in.

movie.title: The Thing In The Basement
movie.description: Super 8 special effects sci-fi horror short by Dick Taylor, featured in issue 4 of Cinemagic, 1975

movie.title: A Stranger In Our House
movie.description: A country family of five take in charming cousin Julie, whose parents recently died in a car crash, though teenaged daughter Rachel grows suspect that she has an alternative agenda; one that possibly includes witchcraft.

movie.title: Room 6
movie.description: A schoolteacher with a phobia of hospitals finds herself searching for her boyfriend inside one while teaming up with a man suffering the same ordeal that she's in.

movie.title: Bull Shark
movie.description: A hungry shark begins feeding on some unsuspecting lake goers in a small Texas town.

movie.title: Cursed
movie.description: A werewolf loose in Los Angeles changes the lives of three young adults who, after being mauled by the beast, learn that the only way to break the curse put upon them is to kill the one who started it all.

movie.title: Hider In The House
movie.description: A deranged man hides in the attic of a new house and becomes obsessed with the unsuspecting family that moves in.

movie.title: Streamer
movie.description: A tub-dweller and a mind-fucker.

movie.title: Slasher
movie.description: Julio inherits a mask like his father used to kill. A group of young people will arrive at his town and cross his path. Julio must decide whether to continue the family tradition or embrace the love he has just known.

movie.title: Silent Night, Deadly Night 3
movie.description: Ricky Caldwell, the notorious 'Killer Santa Claus', awakens from a six-year coma after being kept alive on life-support by a slightly crazed doctor experimenting with ESP and other special abilities. Ricky targets a young, clairvoyant blind woman, named Laura, whom is traveling with her brother Chris, and his girlfriend Jerri to their grandmother's house for Christmas Eve, and Ricky decides to go after her, leaving a trail of dead bodies in his wake.

movie.title: Black Magic Woman
movie.description: The owner of a suburban art gallery searches for someone to perform an exorcism after a witch casts a spell on him.

movie.title: Guys At Parties Like It
movie.description: As part of a brutal hazing ritual, a young frat pledge leads a wasted girl upstairs to swipe his v-card, only to discover getting lucky isn't so easy.

movie.title: Meeting With Death
movie.description: The premise deals with a family living in a country-house which turns out to be 'alive' – to the point where a TV crew is brought in to 'capture' the paranormal phenomena

movie.title: Thriller
movie.description: Years after a childhood prank goes horribly wrong, a clique of South Central LA teens find themselves terrorized during Homecoming weekend by a killer hell-bent on revenge.

movie.title: Black Christmas
movie.description: As the residents of sorority house Pi Kappa Sigma prepare for the festive season, a stranger begins a series of obscene phone calls with dubious intentions...

movie.title: The Cursed
movie.description: In the late 19th century, a brutal land baron slaughters a Roma clan, unleashing a curse on his family and village. In the days that follow, the townspeople are plagued by nightmares, the baron's son goes missing, and a boy is found murdered. The locals suspect a wild animal, but a visiting pathologist warns of a more sinister presence lurking in the woods.

movie.title: The Manipulator
movie.description: An insane Hollywood makeup artist kidnaps a woman and keeps her prisoner in a prop-filled warehouse.

movie.title: Blood Surf
movie.description: A shy tattoo artist must infiltrate a notorious gang of surf witches to discover what happened to her missing brother.

movie.title: Hunting Day
movie.description: Deep in a threatening forest, Sarah faces off with the brutal hunter who killed her sister. Its a cat and mouse fight for survival in this atmospheric thriller, this international story features no dialogue.Q

movie.title: Delirium
movie.description: A man recently released from a mental institute inherits a mansion after his parents die. After a series of disturbing events, he comes to believe it is haunted.

movie.title: The Attic
movie.description: A librarian devotes her life to caring for her wheelchair-bound tyrannical father after being stood up at altar. She fantasizes his death and finds joy only with her pet monkey. When the monkey disappears, a shocking past is revealed.

movie.title: The Devil'S Companions
movie.description: Caught in a strained marriage, Echa finds solace in a man who visits her dreams. But comfort turns to terror when he emerges as a malicious spirit.

movie.title: Closed For The Season
movie.description: Trapped in a forgotten amusement park, a young woman (Kristy) finds herself terrorized by the living memories of the park. She must break free from the park's grasp before she becomes its next victim.

movie.title: The Island Of Revenge
movie.description: The film tells the story of actor Xu Haojie, who kills his girlfriend DouDou to rise to power, marrying producer Ding Li and successfully becoming a famous actor. In their spare time from filming, Liu Yuxin, Li Li, and Zhang Feng, who had developed a fondness for each other, found a speedboat leaking oil and no signal when they returned. Liu Yuxin, Li Li, and Zhang Feng camped overnight on the island, with one pretending to be DouDou and ultimately taken away by the police.

movie.title: Horror
movie.description: The beautiful young daughter of a crazed count fears that she will fall victim to the family curse - to be sacrificed to fulfill an ancient family legend.

movie.title: Horror 1976
movie.description: The beautiful young daughter of a crazed count fears that she will fall victim to the family curse - to be sacrificed to fulfill an ancient family legend.

movie.title: Wishmaster
movie.description: The Djinn, having been released from his ancient prison, seeks to capture the soul of the woman who discovered him, thereby opening a portal and freeing his fellow Djinn to take over the earth.

movie.title: Trap In Hong Kong
movie.description: Philip, a solitary proof reader, is trapped in his apartment, too afraid to leave and tortured by an unknown evil force that has kept him prisoner for the last two years.

movie.title: The Cursed
movie.description: In the late 19th century, a brutal land baron slaughters a Roma clan, unleashing a curse on his family and village. In the days that follow, the townspeople are plagued by nightmares, the baron's son goes missing, and a boy is found murdered. The locals suspect a wild animal, but a visiting pathologist warns of a more sinister presence lurking in the woods.

movie.title: The Dark Heart Of The Black Ops Beats To A Secret Agenda.
movie.description: In an attempt to pull her family together, Adèlle travels with her young daughter Sarah to Wales to visit her father. The morning after they arrive, Sarah mysteriously vanishes in the ocean. Not long after, a little girl bearing a striking resemblance to their missing daughter reveals that she has retuned from the dead — and that Sarah has been taken to the Welsh underworld.

movie.title: Leprechaun 5: In The Hood
movie.description: When Butch, Postmaster P, and Stray Bullet loot the local hip-hop mogul's studio to fund their demo album, the threesome unwittingly ends up with the secret of Mack Daddy's success: a magical flute. Their gigs instantly turn golden but a blood-thristy Leprechaun and an angry Mack Daddy are hot on their trail, leaving a wake of destruction tainted by politically incorrect limericks.

movie.title: Lured To A Killer
movie.description: Two mermaid sisters, who end up performing at a nightclub, face cruel and bloody choices when one of them falls in love with a beautiful young man.
